description: Triggers adversarial spec review via Codex after brainstorming writes a design spec

hooks.prompt: Check if the file just written matches a brainstorming design spec (path contains 'specs/' and filename ends with '-design.md'). If YES: respond with a systemMessage telling Claude to invoke the /brainstorming-spec-review skill on this file path AFTER completing the current brainstorming self-review step. If NO: respond with empty systemMessage.
